title: 4 Pack Christmas Money Wallets for Kids with Envelopes – Cute Festive Gift Card Holders – Santa, Reindeer, Penguin & Polar Bear Designs – Holds Cash, Vouchers or Gift Cards – 16 x 9 cm
features: 🎄 Festive & Fun Designs for Children – Each pack includes 4 colourful Christmas wallets featuring adorable characters: Santa Claus, a reindeer, a penguin and a polar bear – perfect for adding festive cheer to any gift!
💷 Holds Cash, Gift Cards & Vouchers Securely – Each wallet includes slits to neatly hold money, gift cards or vouchers, making them ideal for Christmas gifting.
✉️ Includes Red Envelopes for Gifting – Comes complete with matching red envelopes, making these wallets ready to pop into stockings or post to loved ones.
🖊️ Personalised Greeting Area Inside – Each wallet has a printed section with “To… Merry Christmas From…” for an added personal touch. Blank inside for writing your own message too!
📐 Perfect Size & Easy to Use – Wallets measure 16cm x 9cm, ideal for holding standard notes or gift cards and slipping neatly into the included envelopes.
description: Add a sprinkle of festive fun to your Christmas gifting with this adorable 4-pack of Christmas Money Wallets for Kids ! Whether you're giving cash, gift cards or vouchers, these charming wallets are the perfect way to make your present feel special. Each pack features four unique and cheerful designs that children will love – from a jolly Santa and a smiling reindeer to a cuddly polar bear and a penguin wearing a crown. Every wallet includes a secure slit inside to hold your chosen gift and comes with a matching red envelope , ready to slip under the tree or into a stocking. Designed with convenience in mind, each wallet also includes a personalised greeting section inside, pre-printed with “To… Merry Christmas From…”, plus plenty of space to write your own message . Whether you’re sending gifts by post or hand-delivering them on Christmas morning, these festive wallets make gifting money or vouchers feel magical! ✅ Key Benefits: 🎄 Fun, kid-friendly designs with foil accents ✉️ Red envelopes included for each wallet 💳 Holds gift cards, money or vouchers safely 🖊️ Printed greeting area for easy personalisation 📏 Handy 16cm x 9cm size fits perfectly into envelopes Perfect for parents, grandparents, teachers or family friends looking for a cute and easy way to give money gifts this Christmas!
